Williams Ampère collection
Williams, L. Pearce, 1927-2015.
Ampère, André-Marie, 1775-1836.
Geoffroy Saint-Hilaire, Etienne, 1772-1844.
Swinden, Jan Hendrik van, 1746-1823.
Bonnet, Charles, 1720-1793.

Maine de Biran, Pierre, 1766-1824.
4730
18.5 cubic feet. 18.5 cubic feet.
circa 1793-2005. Manuscripts, printed material, publications, research material, photographs, microfilm Research materials on André-Marie Ampère compiled by L. Pearce Williams. Collection material in French. 6950965
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

Date completed:

EAD encoding:
Kathryn Flannigan, November 2011
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, November 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
History of science professor, Cornell University.
Cornell Class of 1949, Ph.D. 1952.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Research materials on André-Marie Ampère, including manuscripts and letters by Ampère, and manuscripts by contemporaries such as Etienne Geoffroy Saint-Hilaire, Jan Hendrik van Swinden, Justus Liebig, Charles Bonnet, Jean Senebier, and Maine de Biran. This collection consists of Williams's extensive notes in preparation for a book on Ampère. Includes photocopies of many items from other libraries; they remain in the collection perhaps to show items that Williams found important. Annotations by Williams are prevalent throughout. Order is not entirely clear, but folders may contain Williams's coding for organization. Williams had portions of his writing on Ampère published, but the monograph for which this work was prepared was not finished. Collection also includes microfilm of works by Ampère and his contemporaries.
RELATED MATERIALS
Related collection: L. Pearce Williams papers, #14-17-795.
General
Photocopies or other reproductions may not be quoted or reproduced without the permission of the repository holding the originals.
